## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Include relevant context and motivation.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New script
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Script Category

- [ ] bash/system
- [ ] bash/devtools
- [ ] bash/utilities
- [ ] python/automation
- [ ] python/data-processing
- [ ] python/utilities
- [ ] powershell/windows
- [ ] powershell/system
- [ ] powershell/utilities
- [ ] nodejs
- [ ] other

## Checklist

- [ ] My script works as documented in the README
- [ ] README.md is complete with usage examples
- [ ] Tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets/credentials
- [ ] Compatible with latest stable versions
- [ ] I have the rights to submit this code
- [ ] I agree to the [Contributor License Agreement](CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Validation

Please run the appropriate validation tools before submitting:

- [ ] **Bash**: `shellcheck scripts/bash/**/*.sh`
- [ ] **Python**: `pylint scripts/python/` or `flake8`
- [ ] **PowerShell**: `Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path scripts/powershell/`
- [ ] **Node.js**: `eslint scripts/nodejs/`

## Screenshots/Output

If applicable, add screenshots or sample output to help explain the changes.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the pull request here.
